channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Charting the Global Economy: Extensive Growth Toll From Iran War
item.description: Sentiment among the world’s service providers and manufacturers took a synchronized step down during the first month of the Iran war, with business surveys growing pessimistic about economic growth as oil prices surge. Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Buys 220,365 Shares of Terreno Realty Corporation $TRNO
item.description: SG Americas Securities LLC lifted its position in Terreno Realty Corporation (NYSE:TRNO – Free Report) by 273.8% in the fourth quarter, HoldingsChannel.com reports. The firm owned 300,848 shares of the real estate investment trust’s stock after purchasing an additional 220,365 shares during the quarter. SG Americas Securities LLC’s holdings in Terr... Fuente: NewsData CHF

item.title: Insider Selling: Wayfair (NYSE:W) CEO Sells $8,322,471.42 in Stock
item.description: Wayfair Inc. (NYSE:W – Get Free Report) CEO Niraj Shah sold 107,818 shares of the company’s stock in a transaction dated Monday, March 23rd. The shares were sold at an average price of $77.19, for a total transaction of $8,322,471.42. Following the transaction, the chief executive officer directly owned 61,319 shares of the company’s stock, [...] Fuente: NewsData CHF

item.title: Inflation could soar to 6.4 per cent by June, economists predict
item.description: Soaring oil prices caused by the Middle East conflict have triggered a ripple-effect of price hikes across industries. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: Trump jokes about Hormuz as war drags on, markets slide and NATO doubts resurface
item.description: Trump joked about the “Strait of Trump” as the Iran war enters month two, with Hormuz disruptions persisting. Mixed signals on talks continue, while US stocks fell for a fifth week and NATO commitment concerns resurfaced. Summary Trump joked about the “Strait of Trump,” underscoring its central role in the Iran war and global oil flows Conflict ent... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Borrowed peace pays hefty interest – North American Session Market Wrap for March 27
item.description: March 27th, 2026 North-American Session Recap – After a hopeful week, the theme is souring again, as Traders prepare for a heavy week and an even heavier weekend. Check up the latest trends and developments, daily asset and FX performance, what changed fundamentally and what's coming up in the session ahead. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: investingLive Americas market news wrap: Oil prices surge as war worries mount
item.description: Iran expected to deliver counter-proposal to the US today - report Trump signals to allies no immediate plans for Iran invasion Houthis in Yemen announce entry into the conflict to support Iran Secretary of State Rubio said that the war with Iran will continue for another 2-4 weeks UMich final March consumer sentiment 53.3 vs 54.0 expected ECB Schn... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Major US stock indices close lower. Major indices close lower for the 5th week.
item.description: The major US stock indices are closing lower for the day and lower for the week. The decline this week is the 5th consecutive weekly decline. The S P decline is the worst string in 4 years. A look at the closing levels shows: Dow industrial average-793.78 or -1.73% at 45166.33. S P index fell -108.49 or -1.67% at 6368.67. NASDAQ index fell -459.72 ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: CNY: PBoC seen resisting strong appreciation – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank economists Dr. Henry Hao and Volkmar Baur say China’s industrial profits surged early in 2026, led by AI-related electronics, but this strength predates the recent energy shock. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Houthis in Yemen announce entry into the conflict if any alliance joins the US and Israel
item.description: This day just keeps getting worse. At the start of trading Monday it looked like Trump was on track to get some kind of ceasefire by now. Instead, we have talk of bombing steel plants and now this. The Houthis in Yemen say they will enter the conflict on the side of Iran if any alliance joins the US and Israel. The possible chokepoint now is the th... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Nasdaq falls below 21,000 for the first time since August. TSLA shares down more than 3%
item.description: The mood in markets continues to deteriorate into the weekend. I don't know if that's pricing in the chance of a weekend escalation or it's a realization the war could go on for another month (or longer) and that could cripple energy markets. Tech had been vulnerable to AI narratives unwinding all year and it's worsening now. I worry that we're sti... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Markets Weekly Outlook - Middle East uncertainty to dominate ahead of jobs report, Nasdaq 100 at 6-month lows
item.description: The Weekly Outlook details how Middle East uncertainty and oil supply crises drove the Nasdaq into correction territory and pushed the VIX to fever pitch. It examines the dollar's surge and key movements in oil and gold. Plus, a look ahead at the crucial US Jobs Report, Eurozone inflation data, and central bank pressures. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Stocks reach new lows as War goes on – Dow Jones and US Stock Market Outlook
item.description: S P 500, Dow Jones, Nasdaq Analysis and Trading Levels: Equities face intense risk-aversion as the Nasdaq and S P 500 hit new conflict lows, dropping over 1% on the session. Surging Brent crude above $110 reawakens inflation fears while the impending weekend arrival of a 4,500-strong Marine fleet escalates geopolitical anxiety. Explore an intraday ... Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Forecasting the upcoming week: US NFP and inflation in Europe take centre stage
item.description: The US Dollar, having weathered last week's dip, has regained its composure. It's now gained ground, propelled by renewed momentum. This shift comes as Middle Eastern tensions escalate, and worries persist regarding the Strait of Hormuz and its potential impact on worldwide energy markets. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/MXN: Downside risks for Peso after Banxico cut – Standard Chartered
item.description: Standard Chartered’s Dan Pan and Erwin He note that Banxico’s surprise 25 bps cut and guidance for another easing step have increased downside risks for the Mexican Peso (MXN). They highlight crowded MXN long positioning and a narrower carry advantage versus other EM high-yielders. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB Schnabel: There is no need to rush into action
item.description: ECB's Schnabel is speaking and says: We are facing a massive energy price shock. There is no need to rush into action. We have time to analyze the data. ECB should not be rushed to raise rates. This has a stagflation-lite feel—the energy shock keeps inflation risks alive, but the wait-and-see stance tells you the ECB isn’t in a hurry to support gro... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USDJPY cracks above 160.00 for the first time since July 2024
item.description: The USDJPY has pushed decisively above the 160.00 level, extending to a high of 160.29. In doing so, the pair briefly moved above a key swing area from 2024 near 160.25, but the break lacked follow-through, with the move only clearing that zone by a handful of pips before stalling. That hesitation at a prior multi-year reference point is worth noti... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: EUR/USD Weekly Forecast: War headlines and US employment to set the tone
item.description: The EUR/USD pair ends the week around 1.1530, barely below its opening but off the peak at 1.1640. Widespread optimism on Monday was diluted as days went by, and financial markets moved once again on war-related headlines. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB: Oil shock complicates path – ING
item.description: ING notes that ECB officials have offered little resistance to hawkish market pricing as Oil rises, reinforcing front-end EUR rate expectations. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Pound Sterling Price News and Forecast: GBP remains vulnerable amid Mideast crisis
item.description: The Pound Sterling (GBP) showed some resilience against the US Dollar (USD), holding gains from the previous week’s recovery, when the Bank of England (BoE) opted for a hawkish hold. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Technology takes a hit, energy and consumer staples show strength
item.description: Technology takes a hit, energy and consumer staples show strength The US stock market today presented a dynamic landscape, characterized by significant shifts across various sectors. Notably, the technology sector faced headwinds, while energy and consumer staples showed resilience in the turbulent market conditions. 📉 Technology Sector: Facing Cha... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: GBP/USD Weekly Forecast: Pound Sterling remains vulnerable amid Mideast crisis
item.description: The Pound Sterling (GBP) showed some resilience against the US Dollar (USD), holding gains from the previous week’s recovery, when the Bank of England (BoE) opted for a hawkish hold. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Canada: Growth outlook steady with partial rebound – RBC
item.description: Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) economists Claire Fan and Abbey Xu expect Canadian GDP to be essentially flat in January after December’s 0.2% gain, with weakness concentrated in autos and housing but offset by energy and retail. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD: Soft tone but 1.14 base holds – Scotiabank
item.description: Scotiabank strategists Shaun Osborne and Eric Theoret report EUR/USD has slipped slightly below yesterday’s low as Dollar strength persists. ECB data show moderating inflation expectations, while President Lagarde signaled caution on rate moves given energy-price risks. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Euro area: War-driven energy shock reshapes ECB path – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank’s Dr. Vincent Stamer updates Euro area inflation projections incorporating the Iran War and associated energy shock. The bank expects higher Oil and natural gas prices to push headline inflation above 3% in 2026 before easing back to the ECB’s 2% target by 2027. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB's Muller: Not sure we need to wait for fully visible second round effects to act
item.description: ECB might not need to wait for fully visible second round effects before increasing rates Once energy prices have remained elevated for several weeks, one can already be reasonably confident that second round effects are likely I would not be surprised if by the next policy meeting, elevated energy prices were already showing up more broadly in the... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: How have interest rate expectations changed after this week's events?
item.description: Rate hikes by year-end ECB: 85 bps (71% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) BoE: 81 bps (84% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) BoC: 76 bps (77% probability of no change at the next meeting) RBA: 75 bps (72% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) RBNZ: 75 bps (88% probability of no change at the next meeting) BoJ: 54 bps... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: BOJ would hike rates in April "if you think about it normally", says former governor
item.description: Long time no see, Mr. Kuroda. He spokes to the Asahi newspaper in an interview and shared some of his thoughts on BOJ policy setting at the moment. The BOJ would raise the policy rate in April if you think about it normally The US-Iran war would only serve to accelerate interest rate hikes It should not place a pause on the process of monetary poli... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: ECB policymaker Patsalides says no rush to raise interest rates
item.description: I would not rush into any decision, prefer to be more cautious Still need to assess whether this ​should be looked through or whether we should be making a rate decision We don't have sufficient information to make a decision for now I think we are still along the baseline We haven’t seen anything that points to a change in ​either the duration or ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: BOJ re-estimates Japan's estimated natural rate of interest after review
item.description: Using latest data, the estimate of the natural rate of interest is around -0.9% to +0.5% That estimate is as of Q3 2025 BOJ latest estimation is based on six models, including time-series and structural models Although the range itself has not changed significantly, a closer look reveals that many of the estimates have recently been moderately on t... Fuente: ForexLive
